scopeStatus: Task 4 added only child readiness orchestration and bridge cleanup; no JIT settings, failure UI, retry policy, or diagnostics owner.
compatStatus: Every accepted positive PID receives at most one explicit status; tab-only attachment and hasTXMSupport false preserve the approved iOS 15/TrollStore boundary.
